mapper.sql:
AA.MEMB_SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID , AA.MEMB_TYPE , AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.SALT , AA.PSWD
, AA.MEMB_NAME , AA.NICKNAME , AA.PHONE , AA.EMAIL , AA.USE_YN
, AA.AA.WTDR_YN , AA.AA.WTDR_DTTM
, AA.PSWD_CHNG_DTTM , AA.PSWD_ERR_CNT
, AA.RCT_ACS_DTTM , AA.RCT_ACS_IP
, AA.RGTR , AA.RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , AA.CHNG_DTTM
, AA.DORMANT_YN

AA.MEMB_SEQ , AA.PTN_SEQ , AA.MEMB_ID
, AA.MEMB_NAME , AA.NICKNAME , AA.MEMB_TYPE , AA.PHONE , AA.EMAIL
, TO_CHAR(AA.JOIN_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi:SS') AS JOIN_DTTM , AA.USE_YN , AA.WTDR_YN , TO_CHAR(AA.WTDR_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi:SS') AS WTDR_DTT , TO_CHAR(AA.RCT_ACS_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi:SS') AS RCT_ACS_DTTM , AA.RCT_ACS_IP AS MEMB_RCT_ACS_IP , AA.DORMANT_YN AS MEMB_DORMANT_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:mi:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
, AA.DORMANT_YN

sql.if: AND ( REPLACE(UPPER(AA.MEMB_ID), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' OR REPLACE(UPPER(AA.MEMB_NAME), ' ', '') LIKE '%' || REPLACE(UPPER(TRIM(#{allSrch, jdbcType=VARCHAR})), ' ', '') || '%' )

mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.member.mapper.MemberDAO.getMembInfoList */
SELECT MEMB_SEQ, MEMB_ID, EMAIL FROM T_MEMB_INF WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'

/* com.erns.coching.member.mapper.MemberDAO.getMembListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_MEMB_INF WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'

/* mapper.member.com.erns.coching.MemberDAO.checkMembId */
SELECT MEMB_ID FROM T_MEMB_INF AA
AND UPPER(AA.MEMB_ID) = UPPER(#{membId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND UPPER(AA.EMAIL) = UPPER(#{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND UPPER(AA.NICKNAME) = UPPER(#{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT MI.MEMB_SEQ, MI.MEMB_TYPE, MI.MEMB_NAME, MI.PTN_SEQ, PI.PTN_NAME FROM T_MEMB_INF MI LEFT OUTER JOIN T_FILE_INF FI ON FI.REF_SEQ = MI.MEMB_SEQ AND FI.REF_CODE = 'FT_PROFILE' AND FI.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_PARTNER_INF PI ON PI.PTN_SEQ = MI.PTN_SEQ WHERE MI.MEMB_TYPE != '001' AND FI.FILE_ID IS NULL LIMIT #{value ,jdbcType=INTEGER}
